description: Create a segment or a set of segments. Endpoints can be specified either by existing segment-node IDs (by-points) or by positions (by-positions). After endpoint specification, additional properties can be set.

keywords.name: by-points
keywords.description: Create a segment between two existing segment-nodes with IDs i1 and i2. May be followed by group/length/ratio/ratio-reverse/size/type sub-keywords.

keywords.name: by-positions
keywords.description: Create a segment between two 3D positions v1 and v2. Nodes are created automatically at those positions. May be followed by group/length/ratio/ratio-reverse/size/type sub-keywords.

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: Assign the created segment the group name s1 (in slot s2 if provided, in slot Default if not).

keywords.name: length
keywords.description: Set the segment length. Used together with by-points or by-positions when zone sizing should be derived from a target length.

keywords.name: ratio
keywords.description: Set the ratio f (a number between 0.1 and 10.0), which is used to distribute zone lengths along the segment (each zone will be f of the size of the zone preceding it). This setting automatically propagates across dependent segments of regular blocks while ratio-isolate is false.

keywords.name: ratio-reverse
keywords.description: Reverse the ratio direction for the created segment.

keywords.name: size
keywords.description: Set the number of zones on the segment. This setting automatically propagates across dependent segments of regular blocks.

keywords.name: type
keywords.description: Specify the curve type of the segment. Must be followed by a 'curve', 'polyline', 'simple', or 'spline' sub-keyword.

keywords.name: type-curve
keywords.description: Specify a curve segment represented by a B-spline.

keywords.name: type-polyline
keywords.description: Specify a polyline segment (piecewise linear through control points).

keywords.name: type-simple
keywords.description: Specify a simple (straight line) segment. This is the default type.
